message:
fix(core): use op_cx() instead of Cx::new() in statement dispatch paths

Replace bare Cx::new() with self.op_cx()? in execute_statement_dispatch
and execute_statement_dispatch_join_fallback so that a poisoned MVCC
runtime is detected before executing statements rather than silently
using a default context. This ensures BackgroundWorkerFailed errors
propagate correctly when the shared runtime is poisoned.

Hoist the op_cx() call above the savepoint branch in
execute_statement_dispatch so both the savepoint and non-savepoint paths
share the same validated context.

Add test_execute_statement_dispatch_join_fallback_uses_op_cx to verify
that poisoning the shared MVCC state causes the join-fallback dispatch
path to return BackgroundWorkerFailed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
